name: local-context-bridge
description: Local document search and context management for AI agents. Search Word, Excel, PDF files instantly without uploading.
author: whyischen

permissions.name: file_read
permissions.description: Read document files for indexing and search

permissions.name: file_write
permissions.description: Write configuration and cache files to ~/.cbridge/ directory only

permissions.name: local_storage
permissions.description: Store configuration, cache, and document index locally

permissions.name: network_access
permissions.description: Probe local network endpoints (localhost:9090, localhost:8080) to detect existing services

cbridge-agent.description: Must be installed manually before using this skill: pip install cbridge-agent==0.1.5

requiredEnvVars.name: QMD_ENDPOINT
requiredEnvVars.description: QMD service endpoint for external mode (optional)

requiredEnvVars.name: OPENVIKING_ENDPOINT
requiredEnvVars.description: OpenViking service endpoint for external mode (optional)

mode.description: Deployment mode: embedded (built-in) or external (connect to existing services)

auto_setup.description: Automatically setup and initialize on first use. SECURITY: Set to false by default to require explicit user approval.
